text: This is the VOA Special English Health Report.
zh: 这是美国之音特别英语健康报道节目。

text: Uganda's latest outbreak of Ebola virus is the fourth in recent years.
zh: 乌干达最近一次埃博拉病毒爆发是近年来的第四次。

text: About 200 people died in the biggest outbreak in 2000.
zh: 2000年那次最大规模的爆发中约有200人死亡。

text: 37 people died in the last outbreak in 2007.
zh: 在2007年最近一次爆发中，37人死亡。

text: Ebola is a hemorrhagic fever.
zh: 埃博拉是一种出血热疾病。

text: It can lead to bleeding inside and outside the body.
zh: 它会导致体内和体外出血。

text: Symptoms of the disease include high fever, vomiting, and sometimes diarrhea.
zh: 该病的症状包括高热、呕吐，有时还会腹泻。

text: Other signs include weakness, muscle pain, headache, and sore throat.
zh: 其他症状包括虚弱、肌肉疼痛、头痛和咽喉痛。

text: Ebola spreads through contact with blood or other body fluids of infected people.
zh: 埃博拉病毒通过接触感染者的血液或其他体液传播。

text: The virus is often deadly.
zh: 这种病毒往往是致命的。

text: deadly.
zh: 致命的。

text: There is no cure and no vaccine to prevent the disease."
zh: 目前没有治愈方法，也没有预防疫苗。

text: In July, President Yoweri Museveni urged Ugandans to report all suspected cases of Ebola.
zh: 7月，总统约韦里·穆塞韦尼呼吁乌干达人报告所有疑似埃博拉病例。

text: He also urged people to limit their physical contact, even shaking hands.
zh: 他还呼吁人们减少身体接触，甚至不要握手。

text: Yaweri Museveni said, We discourage the shaking of hands because that can cause contact through sweat which can cause problems.
zh: 约韦里·穆塞韦尼说：我们不鼓励握手，因为那可能通过汗液造成接触，从而引发问题。

text: And when people are sick in hospitals with symptoms which look like Ebola, they should be handled by medical workers wearing protective gear.
zh: 当医院里的病人出现类似埃博拉的症状时，应由穿戴防护装备的医护人员来处理。

text: year.
zh: 年。

text: President Museveni also warned people to let medical workers bury suspected Ebola victims.
zh: 穆塞韦尼总统还告诫民众，要让医护人员来埋葬疑似埃博拉遇难者。

text: He said, Please do not take on the job of burying him or her.
zh: 他说：请不要自己承担埋葬他或她的工作。

text: Call the medical workers to be the ones to do it because they are the ones who can do it safely.
zh: 请呼叫医护人员来处理，因为他们才能安全地完成这项工作。

text: safely.
zh: 安全地。

text: Most of the cases in the latest outbreak have been reported in western Uganda.
zh: 此次最新一轮疫情中的大多数病例都出现在乌干达西部。

text: A World Health Organization official said the first cases in July were mistaken for cholera.
zh: 世界卫生组织一名官员表示，7月出现的首批病例最初被误诊为霍乱。

text: But Denis Luwamafa from Uganda's Ministry of Health says Uganda has improved its ability to identify cases of Ebola.
zh: 但乌干达卫生部的丹尼斯·卢瓦马法表示，乌干达在识别埃博拉病例方面的能力已有所提升。

text: He said Uganda is probably in the lead when it comes to dealing with hemorrhagic fevers in Africa.
zh: 他说，在应对非洲出血热方面，乌干达可能处于领先地位。

text: He said the diagnosis of the Ebola virus outbreak was done in Uganda.
zh: 他说，此次埃博拉疫情的诊断工作就是在乌干达完成的。

text: Denis Lilwamafa said although the disease is also found in nearby countries, outbreaks are not always identified.
zh: 丹尼斯·卢瓦马法说，尽管邻国也存在这种疾病，但疫情并不总能被识别出来。

text: He said, in other countries, especially in some of the neighboring countries,
zh: 他说，在其他国家，尤其是一些邻国，

text: many times Ebola goes unrecognized and other times it goes unreported.
zh: 很多时候埃博拉病例未被识别，有时甚至未被上报。

text: He said in some neighboring countries, Ebola destroys whole villages.
zh: 他说，在一些邻国，埃博拉曾摧毁整个村庄。

text: villages.
zh: 村庄。

text: He said it then disappears because there is nobody left to infect.
zh: 他说，随后疫情就会消失，因为已经没有人可供感染了。

text: Ebola fever is named after a river near the first recognized outbreak.
zh: 埃博拉热是以最早被确认爆发地附近的一条河流命名的。

text: That was in 1976 in Zaire, now the Democratic Republic of Congo.
zh: 那次爆发发生在1976年的扎伊尔，如今的刚果民主共和国。

text: To read, listen and learn English, go to voaspecialenglish .com.
zh: 想要阅读、收听并学习英语，请访问 voaspecialenglish.com。

text: You can also read the book, The find our captioned videos at the VOA Learning English channel on YouTube.
zh: 您还可以阅读该书，并在YouTube上的“美国之音学英语”频道找到我们带字幕的视频。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Carolyn Prosutti.
zh: 这是美国之音特别英语节目，我是卡罗琳·普罗苏蒂。
